title: (Bearish Signal) CRWD, RSI Indicator left the overbought zone on January 13, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a signal that CRWD's price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. A.I.dvisor looked back and found 19 similar cases where CRWD's RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 16 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 84%. Current price $225.03 is above $145.13 the highest support line found by A.I. Throughout the month of 12/10/20 - 01/13/21, the price experienced a +26% Uptrend. During the week of 01/06/21 - 01/13/21, the stock enjoyed a +8% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/qms7uh45ucb61.png?width=1518&format=png&auto=webp&s=01f753e7b235058c870883453eeaa6bbef917ac4

**Bearish Trend Analysis**

The 10-day RSI Indicator for CRWD moved out of overbought territory on January 13, 2021. This could be a bearish sign for the stock. Traders may want to consider selling the stock or buying put options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor looked at 19 similar instances where the indicator moved out of overbought territory. In 16 of the 19 cases, the stock moved lower in the following days. This puts the odds of a move lower at 84%.

The Stochastic Indicator has been in the overbought zone for 2 days. Expect a price pull-back in the near future.

Following a 3-day decline, the stock is projected to fall further. Considering past instances where CRWD declined for three days, the price rose further in 50 of 62 cases within the following month. The odds of a continued downward trend are 78%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/8752859-crowdstrike-holdings-inc-ordinary-shares-crwd-226-42-rsi-indicator-left-the-overbought-zone-on-january-13-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=article&utm_term=signal)
